name: Blake Williams Bus Trnsprtn
recent_news: 2023-2024: Owner Blake Williams publicly advocated against magnet transportation cuts in Hamilton County; reported ~$1.4M invested in buses including a $133K bus (2022) and one on order at $218K.
fit_notes: Tiny independent owner-operator (~10 buses) on Hamilton County magnet routes alongside First Student. Owner-operator model with significant recent fleet investment - possible micro tuck-in but minimal scale; succession unclear.

name: Ryno School Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: likely Hamilton County Schools (TN) area - Ooltewah/Chattanooga
fit_notes: Single-location LLC with ~4 employees in Hamilton County TN. Almost no digital footprint - likely a 1-3 bus owner-operator subcontracting under First Student/HCS contract. Too small to be a meaningful standalone tuck-in.

name: H & K School Transportation
districts_or_customers: Mahwah Township Public Schools area (Bergen County, NJ)
recent_news: No public M&A or growth news found.
fit_notes: Very small (~3 employees) NJ school bus operator at 145 Ramapo Valley Rd, Mahwah. Likely owner-operator serving Mahwah/Bergen County. Below scale relevance for Summit tuck-in; possible only as a route/contract roll-up component.

name: Kaprielian James M Bus
principals: James M. Kaprielian (attorney/administrative law judge, not bus operator)
recent_news: Not a transportation company. 2444 Main St Ste 110, Fresno is/was the law office of attorney James M. Kaprielian (CA Bar #105832); he is now an administrative law judge and not in private practice. The phone (559) 486-5730 was his law office line.
fit_notes: NOT A SCHOOL BUS OPERATOR - data record appears to be a misclassified law office listing (likely 'Kaprielian James M Esq' truncated). Exclude from target universe.

name: Mississippi Valley Farm Bus
recent_news: Mississippi Valley Farm Business Association is a 501(c)(5) farm financial/business services co-op (farm bookkeeping, tax prep, ag business consulting), not a school bus operator. 2024 revenue ~$1.0M. Affiliated with Iowa Farm Business Association.
fit_notes: NOT A SCHOOL BUS OPERATOR - 'Bus' is short for 'Business' (Farm Business Association). Exclude from target universe.
